prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别约3301名、5490名、4769名、18603名（2024年因新高考批次合并导致位次体系变化，参考价值有限）、7661名。2025年基 准位次约7661名，近两年（2023–2025）位次从4769后移至7661，累计后移约2892名，呈明显后移趋势；该校在广西理科/物理类招生计划2021年31人、2022年31 人、2023年29人、2024年32人、2025年33人；2026年计划34人，较2025年扩招1人（约+3%），小幅扩招对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 对外经济贸易大学为211工 程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第57名，属财经类顶尖院校，在财经领域有"两财一贸"之称，层次稳固；该校在2026年声誉评价中无显著正面或 负面事件记录；抖音综合热度排名第91位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现高热关注或明显报考信号；近年无投档线断档或异常记录，声誉整体平稳。应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，均为A-及以上等级，与该校金融学类、工商管理类、数据科学与大数据技术等招生专业关联紧密，学科实力突出。金融/财经/经济类专业2024年热度评估为"分化观望"，较2021年明显降温；计算机类2024年评估为"推荐"，但 较2023年（82.69）明显降温，整体IT/财经双降温。广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，较2025年增加约3.3%，按2025年物理类占比68.6%估算，2026年物理类考生约26.9万人 ，竞争基数扩大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于北京，属一线城市，对广西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在广西招生占比约2.5%–3.5%，属中 等水平，无特殊地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7661名、2026年计划小幅扩招（+3%）、广西物理类考生总数小幅增加（约+3.3%）、扩招与考生增加大致抵 消、财经/IT类专业热度双降温、近年位次持续后移趋势，预计2026年竞争略加剧，位次继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约7850名，区间7350–8350名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 3301, 5490, 4769, 18603 (the 2024 ranking has limited reference value due to the new college entrance examination batch merger causing changes in the ranking system), and 7661. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 7661. In the past two years (2023–2025), the ranking shifted from 4769 to 7661, a cumulative backward shift of about 2892, showing a clear backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Guangxi was 31 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 33 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 34, an increase of 1 student (about +3%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of International Business and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It is a top-tier institution in finance and economics, known as one of the 'Two Finance and One Trade' universities, with a stable reputation. In 2026, there were no significant positive or negative reputation events recorded. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 91st, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, no high-heat attention or obvious application signals. In recent years, there have been no abnormal admission cutoff score drops or records, and the reputation remains generally stable. Applied Economics (A), Business Administration (A), and Foreign Language and Literature (A-) are all rated A- or above, closely related to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration, and Data Science and Big Data Technology, highlighting strong academic strength. The 2024 heat assessment for finance/economics/economy majors is 'differentiated and wait-and-see', significantly cooler than 2021. The 2024 assessment for computer majors is 'recommended', but significantly cooler than 2023 (82.69), showing a general cooling trend in both IT and finance. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guangxi general college entrance examination is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% over 2025. Based on the 2025 physics category proportion of 68.6%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 269,000, expanding the competition base.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.5%–3.5%, at a medium level, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7661, the 2026 plan for a slight expansion (+3%), a small increase in the total number of Guangxi physics category candidates (about +3.3%), the roughly offsetting effects of expansion and candidate increase, the cooling of both finance/IT major popularity, and the recent continuous backward trend in rankings, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to shift backward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7850, with a range of 7350–8350.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (enrolled in a broad category, including Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Statistics
- Data Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Actuarial Science (including dual degree programs and experimental classes)
- Financial Engineering (enrolled in a broad category, including Financial Technology)
- Law (Law)
- Economics (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation)
- Finance (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration)
- Financial Mathematics
- Customs Management (Customs and Big Data Application Top Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (7350–8350), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 7400), you can focus on aiming for new engineering majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology and Statistics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 8300), you should use Tier 3 majors such as Business Administration and Financial Mathematics as a safety net, with Tier 2 majors like Economics and Finance as the main target.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 589, 1005, 614, 11384 (the 2024 ranking has limited reference value due to the new college entrance examination batch merger causing a change in the ranking system), and 990. 学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of International Business and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It is a top-tier institution in the field of finance and economics, known as one of the 'Two Finance and One Trade' universities, with a solid standing; there were no significant positive or negative reputation events recorded in 2026; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 91st, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no high attention or obvious application signals; there have been no abnormal cutoff score drops or records in recent years, and its reputation remains stable overall; Applied Economics is rated A, Business Administration A, and Foreign Languages and Literature A-, all at A- or above, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration, and Foreign Languages and Literature, highlighting strong academic strength and sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/economics/economy majors was assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see', significantly cooling down compared to 2021 (72.42), with public opinion on applying for finance and economics becoming more rational; law majors were assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see', with popularity basically stable. 预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 990, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the total number of Guangxi history category candidates (about +3.3%), the cooling and divergence of finance and economics major popularity, and stable university reputation, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026, with rankings moving slightly backward.
